channel.title: SharePoint on Vibhu Bhatnagar — PowerShell & Infrastructure Engineer
channel.description: Recent content in SharePoint on Vibhu Bhatnagar — PowerShell & Infrastructure Engineer

item.title: SharePoint Migration Elevated: Migration Manager Over SPMT
item.description:
The Point

If you still run your SharePoint migrations with the SharePoint Migration Tool (SPMT), Migration Manager is the upgrade worth switching to — same job, far less babysitting.
